people.name: Prabowo Subianto
people.notes: Central political signal for agenda and sector priorities.

people.name: Gibran Rakabuming Raka
people.notes: Useful for monitoring youth, digital, and regional policy messaging.

people.name: Rosan Roeslani
people.role: Minister of Investment and downstream policy
people.notes: Appears in the scraped Setkab homepage as a current public signal around investment and trade.

people.circle: SMEs / social policy / migrant workers / creative economy

people.name: Menteri Koordinator Bidang Pangan

policies.title: Tinggalkan Paris Menuju Jakarta, Presiden Prabowo Akhiri Kunjungan Resmi Kenegaraan di Prancis
policies.description: Prabowo ends the official state visit in France; useful as a signal for defense, trade, and foreign-investment sentiment.

policies.title: Menteri Investasi Rosan: Dewan Bisnis Indonesia - Prancis Jadi Mesin Penggerak Investasi dan Perdagangan Dua Arah
policies.description: Business council Indonesia-France as a channel for investment and two-way trade.

policies.title: Presiden Prabowo dan Presiden Macron Bahas Kerja Sama Pertahanan hingga IEU-CEPA di Istana Élysée
policies.description: Defense cooperation and IEU-CEPA discussions; higher-level signal for industrial, export, and procurement themes.

policies.title: Dari Rafale hingga Palestina, Presiden Prabowo dan Presiden Macron Perkuat Sinergi Strategis Dua Negara
policies.description: Rafale and wider strategic cooperation headline, another defense procurement signal.

policies.title: Di Istana Élysée, Presiden Prabowo Dorong Penguatan Kemitraan Indonesia–Prancis di Tengah Ketidakpastian Global dan Konflik Dunia
policies.description: Broader partnership framing, useful as a soft signal for exporters and market-sensitive sectors.

policies.title: Inilah Kementerian Negara Kabinet Merah Putih
policies.description: This article exposes the current sectoral coordination map and the ministries attached to each cluster.

policies.title: Food coordination cluster
policies.description: Menteri Koordinator Bidang Pangan mengoordinasikan: a. Kementerian Pertanian; b. Kementerian Kehutanan; c. Kementerian Kelautan dan Perikanan; d. Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup/Badan Pengendalian Lingkungan Hidup; e. Badan Pangan Nasional; f. Badan Gizi Nasional; dan g. instansi lain yang dianggap perlu.

policies.title: Regional development coordination cluster
policies.description: Menteri Koordinator Bidang Pembangunan Kewilayahan mengoordinasikan: a. Kementerian Agraria dan Tata Ruang/Badan Pertanahan Nasional; b. Kementerian Pekerjaan Umum; c. Kementerian Perumahan dan Kawasan Permukiman; d. Kementerian Transmigrasi; e. Kementerian Perhubungan; dan f. instansi lain yang dianggap perlu.

policies.title: Community empowerment coordination cluster
policies.description: Menteri Koordinator Bidang Pemberdayaan Masyarakat mengoordinasikan: a. Kementerian Sosial; b. Kementerian Pelindungan Pekerja Migran Indonesia/Badan Pelindungan Pekerja Migran Indonesia; c. Kementerian Desa dan Pembangunan Daerah Tertinggal; d. Kementerian Koperasi; e. Kementerian Usaha Mikro, Kecil, dan Menengah; f. Kementerian Ekonomi Kreatif/ Badan Ekonomi Kreatif; dan g. instansi lain yang dianggap perlu.

policies.title: Memperkuat Ekonomi dan Sosial melalui Sektor Pariwisata
policies.description: Tourism as an economic and social engine; useful for airlines, hotels, travel, and consumer names.

policies.title: Sistem Pembelajaran Pengembangan Kompetensi Secara Terintegrasi (Corporate University)
policies.description: Corporate university and integrated competency building; a public productivity signal.

policies.title: Memayungi Masyarakat Adat di Wilayah Perbatasan
policies.description: Protection and inclusion for border and indigenous communities, often tied to infrastructure and telecom needs.

policies.title: Apakah Debottlenecking di Sektor Publik?
policies.description: Debottlenecking in the public sector; often a signal for process and digitization reforms.

notes.title: Public-source seed
notes.body: Seeded from live scraping of Setkab homepage headlines and the Setkab article about Kabinet Merah Putih ministry clusters.

notes.title: How to read the watchlist
notes.body: The score is heuristic only. It reflects policy relevance, timing, and implementation confidence; it is not financial advice.
